raw.raw_text: My dashboard only shows 1000 rows even though I have 5000 in my data. Is this broken? I'm on the free plan if that matters.

analysis.narration: The user reports their dashboard showing only 1000 rows despite having 5000 rows in the data on the free plan. This is a known limitation of the free plan, not a bug, so the severity is low. The report is lacking details on expected results or necessary steps to reproduce.
